apps.name: MenuBro
apps.details: Browse the web directly from your macOS menu bar. Fast, efficient, and always accessible.

features.title: Multi-Tab Browsing
features.description: Open multiple websites simultaneously. Supports tab drag-and-drop sorting and pinning important tabs.

features.title: Multi-Screen Design
features.description: Specially designed for multi-screen setups. Specify which screen windows appear on for optimal workflow.

features.title: Device Emulation
features.description: Switch between different device types with appropriate user agents for desktop and mobile browsing.

features.title: Global Shortcuts
features.description: Access MenuBro quickly with customizable keyboard shortcuts for efficient browsing.

features.title: Responsive Interface
features.description: Clean, beautiful user interface that adapts to different content and supports light/dark modes.

features.title: Privacy Protection
features.description: Enable additional privacy features to protect your browsing data when you step away.

zh-hans.description: 你的轻量级菜单栏浏览器
zh-hans.details: 直接在 macOS 菜单栏中浏览网页，快速、高效、随时可用。

features.title: 多标签浏览
features.description: 可同时打开多个网站，支持标签拖拽排序与固定重要标签。

features.title: 多屏幕设计
features.description: 专为多屏幕环境设计，可指定窗口出现在哪块屏幕上，让工作流程更顺畅。

features.title: 设备模拟
features.description: 可切换不同设备类型与对应的 User-Agent，自由模拟桌面与移动端浏览。

features.title: 全局快捷键
features.description: 通过可自定义的键盘快捷键快速唤起 MenuBro，浏览更高效。

features.title: 响应式界面
features.description: 简洁美观的用户界面，适配不同内容，并支持浅色/深色模式。

features.title: 隐私保护
features.description: 可开启额外的隐私功能，在你离开时保护你的浏览数据。

zh-hant.description: 你的輕量級選單列瀏覽器
zh-hant.details: 直接在 macOS 選單列中瀏覽網頁，快速、高效、隨時可用。

features.title: 多分頁瀏覽
features.description: 可同時開啟多個網站，支援分頁拖曳排序與釘選重要分頁。

features.title: 多螢幕設計
features.description: 專為多螢幕環境設計，可指定視窗顯示在哪個螢幕上，讓工作流程更順暢。

features.title: 裝置模擬
features.description: 可切換不同裝置類型與對應的 User-Agent，自由模擬桌面與行動裝置瀏覽。

features.title: 全域快速鍵
features.description: 透過可自訂的鍵盤快速鍵快速喚起 MenuBro，瀏覽更有效率。

features.title: 響應式介面
features.description: 簡潔美觀的使用者介面，適應不同內容，並支援淺色/深色模式。

features.title: 隱私保護
features.description: 可開啟額外的隱私功能，在你離開時保護你的瀏覽資料。

informationWeCollect.title: 1. Information We Collect
informationWeCollect.content: MenuBro ("the App") respects and protects your privacy rights. This Privacy Policy explains in detail how we collect, use, store, and protect your personal information. We may collect the following types of information:
items: Nothing

howWeUseInformation.title: 2. How We Use Information
howWeUseInformation.content: We may use the collected information for the following purposes:
items: Nothing we collect, nothing we use

informationSharing.title: 3. Information Sharing
informationSharing.content: We do not sell your personal information to third parties. However, we may share your information in the following circumstances:
items: Do not share anything

thirdPartyServices.title: 4. Third-Party Services
thirdPartyServices.content: The App may link to third-party websites or services, such as social media platforms, analytics tools, etc.
items: No Third-Party Services

yourRights.title: 6. Your Rights
yourRights.content: Under applicable laws, you may have the following rights:
items: Anything yuou want

contactUs.title: 7. Contact Us
contactUs.content: If you have any questions, comments, or requests regarding this Privacy Policy, please contact us through the following methods:

changesToPrivacyPolicy.title: 8. Changes to Privacy Policy
changesToPrivacyPolicy.content: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. The updated policy will be posted on this page with the update date. We recommend that you review this policy regularly to stay informed of any changes.

apps.name: NumWise
apps.description: Convert numbers between different bases with ease.
apps.details: NumWise is a powerful utility that allows you to convert numbers between binary, octal, decimal, and hexadecimal formats instantly.

features.title: Multi-Radix Number Visualization
features.description: Display numbers in different numeral systems (binary, octal,decimal, hexadecimal) with real-time conversion and visual representation of number structure.

features.title: Binary Grouping Display
features.description: Visualize binary representations with customizable grouping options to help understand bit patterns and structures.

features.title: International Language Support
features.description: Support for multiple languages including Arabic, Chinese, Japanese, Korean, and many European languages for global accessibility.

features.title: Radix Indicator System
features.description: Clear visual indicators showing the current numeral system being used with intuitive color coding and symbols.

zh-hans.description: 轻松完成不同进制之间的数字转换。
zh-hans.details: NumWise 是一款强大的实用工具，可在二进制、八进制、十进制和十六进制之间即时转换数字。

features.title: 多进制数字可视化
features.description: 以二进制、八进制、十进制、十六进制等不同进制展示数字，实时转换并直观呈现数字结构。

features.title: 二进制分组显示
features.description: 以可自定义的分组方式展示二进制表示，帮助理解位模式与结构。

features.title: 多语言支持
features.description: 支持阿拉伯语、中文、日语、韩语及多种欧洲语言，服务全球用户。

features.title: 进制指示系统
features.description: 通过直观的配色与符号，清晰标识当前使用的进制。

zh-hant.description: 輕鬆完成不同進位制之間的數字轉換。
zh-hant.details: NumWise 是一款強大的實用工具，可在二進位、八進位、十進位和十六進位之間即時轉換數字。

features.title: 多進位數字視覺化
features.description: 以二進位、八進位、十進位、十六進位等不同進位制顯示數字，即時轉換並直觀呈現數字結構。

features.title: 二進位分組顯示
features.description: 以可自訂的分組方式顯示二進位表示，幫助理解位元模式與結構。

features.title: 多語言支援
features.description: 支援阿拉伯文、中文、日文、韓文及多種歐洲語言，服務全球使用者。

features.title: 進位指示系統
features.description: 透過直觀的配色與符號，清楚標示目前使用的進位制。

informationWeCollect.title: 1. Information We Collect
informationWeCollect.content: MenuBro ("the App") respects and protects your privacy rights. This Privacy Policy explains in detail how we collect, use, store, and protect your personal information. We may collect the following types of information:
items: Nothing

howWeUseInformation.title: 2. How We Use Information
howWeUseInformation.content: We may use the collected information for the following purposes:
items: Nothing we collect, nothing we use

informationSharing.title: 3. Information Sharing
informationSharing.content: We do not sell your personal information to third parties. However, we may share your information in the following circumstances:
items: Do not share anything

thirdPartyServices.title: 4. Third-Party Services
thirdPartyServices.content: The App may link to third-party websites or services, such as social media platforms, analytics tools, etc.
items: No Third-Party Services

yourRights.title: 6. Your Rights
yourRights.content: Under applicable laws, you may have the following rights:
items: Anything yuou want

contactUs.title: 7. Contact Us
contactUs.content: If you have any questions, comments, or requests regarding this Privacy Policy, please contact us through the following methods:

changesToPrivacyPolicy.title: 8. Changes to Privacy Policy
changesToPrivacyPolicy.content: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. The updated policy will be posted on this page with the update date. We recommend that you review this policy regularly to stay informed of any changes.

apps.name: Lucky - Feel Your Luck
apps.details: Experience the thrill of testing your luck with our collection of classic fortune games. Whether you believe in luck or just want to have fun, Lucky brings you an authentic gaming experience with beautiful retro pixel art design featuring Random Number Challenge, Coin Flip, Sic Bo, Holy Cup Divination, and Fortune Sticks.

features.title: Random Number Challenge
features.description: Draw random numbers until you hit your target. The fewer attempts, the luckier you are! Our unique 10-level luck scoring system (0-100) provides instant feedback on your fortune.

features.title: Classic Fortune Games
features.description: Experience authentic traditional games including Coin Flip, Sic Bo (骰宝), Holy Cup Divination (圣杯), and Fortune Sticks (求签) with stunning 3D animations.

features.title: Retro Pixel Art Design
features.description: Beautiful 8-bit pixel art design with smooth animations, haptic feedback, and support for 34+ languages for a nostalgic yet modern experience.

features.title: Complete History Tracking
features.description: Track all your lucky moments with complete game history. Share your best results with friends and review your fortune patterns over time.

zh-hans.details: 通过一系列经典试运气小游戏感受手气起伏。无论你是否相信运气，Lucky 都能以精美的复古像素风带来纯正的游戏体验，包含随机数字挑战、抛硬币、骰宝、掷圣杯和求签。

features.title: 随机数字挑战
features.description: 不断抽取随机数字直到命中目标，次数越少运气越好！独特的 10 级运气评分系统（0-100）即时反馈你的手气。

features.title: 经典运势游戏
features.description: 体验抛硬币、骰宝、掷圣杯、求签等正宗传统玩法，配以精彩的 3D 动画。

features.title: 复古像素风设计
features.description: 精美的 8 位像素美术、流畅动画与触觉反馈，支持 34 种以上语言，怀旧又现代。

features.title: 完整历史记录
features.description: 完整记录每一个幸运时刻，与朋友分享最佳成绩，回顾你的运势变化。

zh-hant.details: 透過一系列經典試手氣小遊戲感受運氣起伏。無論你是否相信運氣，Lucky 都能以精美的復古像素風帶來純正的遊戲體驗，包含隨機數字挑戰、擲硬幣、骰寶、擲筊和求籤。

features.title: 隨機數字挑戰
features.description: 不斷抽取隨機數字直到命中目標，次數越少運氣越好！獨特的 10 級運氣評分系統（0-100）即時回饋你的手氣。

features.title: 經典運勢遊戲
features.description: 體驗擲硬幣、骰寶、擲筊、求籤等道地傳統玩法，搭配精彩的 3D 動畫。

features.title: 復古像素風設計
features.description: 精美的 8 位元像素美術、流暢動畫與觸覺回饋，支援 34 種以上語言，懷舊又現代。

features.title: 完整歷史紀錄
features.description: 完整記錄每一個幸運時刻，與朋友分享最佳成績，回顧你的運勢變化。

items: Nothing

contactUs.content: If you have any questions, comments, or requests regarding this Privacy Policy, please contact us through the following methods:

changesToPrivacyPolicy.content: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. The updated policy will be posted on this page with the update date. We recommend that you review this policy regularly to stay informed of any changes.

apps.name: StoryBoat
apps.description: Read EPUB, TXT, and PDF with immersive themes and natural voices.
apps.details: StoryBoat is a focused reading app for long-form text. Read quietly, listen naturally with system or online TTS voices, add notes and bookmarks, and stay in sync with your reading flow.

features.title: Focused Reading
features.description: Read EPUB, TXT, PDF, and long-form text with themes, typography controls, and continuous reading designed for immersion.

features.title: Natural Listening
features.description: Switch between built-in system voices and compatible online TTS services to listen in the voice and style that fits you best.

features.title: Notes and Progress
features.description: Save highlights, annotations, and reading progress so your place is easy to recover across long sessions.

features.title: Supporter Features
features.description: Optional support plans and tips help sustain development while keeping core reading features fully available.

zh-hans.description: 沉浸式主题与自然语音，畅读 EPUB、TXT 和 PDF。
zh-hans.details: StoryBoat 是一款专注长文本阅读的应用。安静地读，或用系统/在线 TTS 语音自然地听，支持笔记与书签，让阅读心流不被打断。

features.title: 专注阅读
features.description: 支持 EPUB、TXT、PDF 与长文本，提供主题、排版控制与连续阅读，营造沉浸式体验。

features.title: 自然聆听
features.description: 可在系统内置语音与兼容的在线 TTS 服务之间切换，用最适合你的声音聆听。

features.title: 笔记与进度
features.description: 保存高亮、批注与阅读进度，长时间阅读也能轻松回到上次的位置。

features.title: 支持者功能
features.description: 可选的支持计划与打赏帮助应用持续开发，核心阅读功能始终完整可用。

zh-hant.description: 沉浸式主題與自然語音，暢讀 EPUB、TXT 和 PDF。
zh-hant.details: StoryBoat 是一款專注長文閱讀的 App。安靜地讀，或用系統／線上 TTS 語音自然地聽，支援筆記與書籤，讓閱讀心流不被打斷。

features.title: 專注閱讀
features.description: 支援 EPUB、TXT、PDF 與長文本，提供主題、排版控制與連續閱讀，營造沉浸式體驗。

features.title: 自然聆聽
features.description: 可在系統內建語音與相容的線上 TTS 服務之間切換，用最適合你的聲音聆聽。

features.title: 筆記與進度
features.description: 儲存標示、註解與閱讀進度，長時間閱讀也能輕鬆回到上次的位置。

features.title: 支持者功能
features.description: 可選的支持方案與打賞協助 App 持續開發，核心閱讀功能始終完整可用。

informationWeCollect.title: 1. Information We Collect
informationWeCollect.content: StoryBoat ("the App") is designed to keep reading data on your device whenever possible. We only process the information required to provide the features you choose to use.
items: Reading content and progress stored locally on your device.
Optional account tokens or endpoint settings you enter for online text-to-speech providers.
Optional iCloud sync data if you enable Apple cloud synchronization.
Basic purchase status returned by Apple when you use in-app purchases or subscriptions.

howWeUseInformation.title: 2. How We Use Information
howWeUseInformation.content: We use information only to operate the reading and listening features you enable.
items: To open, render, and remember your reading position in books and documents.
To send text you choose to compatible online TTS services for synthesis when you enable those services.
To sync reading-related data through iCloud when you turn on sync.
To verify purchases, subscriptions, and supporter benefits through Apple systems.

informationSharing.title: 3. Information Sharing
informationSharing.content: We do not sell your personal information. Information is shared only when it is necessary to deliver a feature you explicitly use.
items: Apple may process purchase, subscription, and iCloud data according to Apple's own policies.
Online TTS providers receive the text and configuration required to synthesize speech only when you choose to use them.
No reading data is shared with third parties for advertising.

thirdPartyServices.title: 4. Third-Party Services
thirdPartyServices.content: Some optional features rely on third-party services selected by you.
items: Apple services such as App Store purchases and iCloud sync.
Optional online TTS services or self-hosted compatible endpoints configured by the user.

dataSecurity.title: 5. Data Security
dataSecurity.content: We use platform-provided storage and security mechanisms where available. Sensitive provider credentials you enter are stored on your device and are not used for purposes unrelated to the service configuration you selected.

yourRights.title: 6. Your Rights
yourRights.content: Depending on your region, you may have rights to access, correct, export, or delete your personal data.
items: You can delete local reading data from the app or remove the app from your device.
You can remove configured TTS accounts and provider settings at any time.
You can manage Apple subscriptions through your Apple ID account settings.

contactUs.title: 7. Contact Us
contactUs.content: If you have questions about this Privacy Policy or StoryBoat's data handling, contact us here:

changesToPrivacyPolicy.title: 8. Changes to Privacy Policy
changesToPrivacyPolicy.content: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time. Any changes will be posted on this page with an updated effective date.
